The Military DoD SkillBridge program is an opportunity for Service members to gain valuable civilian work experience through specific industry training, apprenticeships, or internships during the last 180 days of service. General Purpose Of The Position

The Product Development Design Engineer is responsible for the design and development of new fiber optic cable products, including creating detailed designs and ensuring prototypes are built in accordance with design specifications. This role supports the successful commercialization of new products by collaborating across engineering, manufacturing, and other cross-functional teams to bring innovative fiber optic cable solutions from concept through production.
